coat_colors: white with patches of any color

description.overview: Named for their butterfly-like ears (papillon means butterfly in French), these tiny dogs are surprisingly athletic and intelligent. They excel in agility and obedience.
description.temperament: Known for being alert, friendly, happy.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their long, fine, silky, single coat coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

not_for: Those wanting a lap dog only
verdict.summary: Named for their butterfly-like ears (papillon means butterfly in French), these tiny dogs are surprisingly athletic and intelligent. They excel in agility and obedience.
